title: Quran, Sura 73: Al-Muzzammil
description: Sura 73 (Al-Muzzammil: The Enshrouded One) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 73 (Al-Muzzammil: The Enshrouded One) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: O you who wraps himself in clothing, arise and pray during the night, except for a little.
